# CWE-523: login credentials accepted on cleartext HTTP listener.
lang: go
file: CWE-523-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func StartLoginService(db *sqlx.DB) *http.Server {
	r := gin.New()
	r.POST("/login", func(c *gin.Context) {
		user := c.PostForm("username")
		pass := c.PostForm("password")
		_ = db.QueryRowx("SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ? AND password = ?", user, pass)
		c.String(http.StatusOK, "welcome")
	})
	return &http.Server{Addr: ":8080", Handler: r}
}
